name: 移民浪潮
subject: history
domain_name: Period 6-7 镀金时代与进步时代 Gilded Age & Progressive (1865-1945)
curriculum_points:
KC-1.2.I
European expansion into the Western Hemisphere generated intense social, religious, political, and economic competition and changes within European societies.

KC-1.2.II
The Columbian Exchange and development of the Spanish Empire in the Western Hemisphere resulted in extensive demographic, economic, and social changes.

KC-1.2.II.A
Spanish exploration and conquest of the Americas were accompanied and furthered by widespread deadly epidemics that devastated native populations and by the introduction of crops and animals not found in the Americas.

KC-1.2.II.B
In the encomienda system, Spanish colonial economies marshaled Native American labor to support plantation-based agriculture and extract precious metals and other resources.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 历史时间轴：朝代/事件节点交互，点击展开详情卡片

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「移民浪潮」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。

The Columbian Exchange and development of the Spanish Empire in the We… 对理解「移民浪潮」为何重要？
